_comment: SYNCED SNAPSHOT — do not hand-edit. Regenerate with: node scripts/sync-workflow-catalog.mjs (pulls api.esy.com GET /v1/catalog/workflows). Mirrors the platform's published, versioned workflow templates.

items.name: Generate Analytical Essay
items.description: Deconstruct a text, event, or concept through a critical lens: perform close reading, identify patterns and themes, then produce a structured analytical essay grounded in specific evidence from the source.
items.shortDescription: Analyze a text or concept through a critical lens.

items.name: Generate Argumentative Essay
items.description: Build a thesis-driven argumentative essay: develop supporting evidence and the strongest counterarguments, organize them under a clear thesis, then draft a fully structured essay with a counterargument section and conclusion.
items.shortDescription: Draft a thesis-driven argumentative essay with rebuttals.

items.name: Generate Clip Art Asset
items.description: Generate an internal ESY visual artifact using the clip.art prompt/style contract, provider runtime policy, ESY R2 storage, and review-ready metadata.
items.shortDescription: Generate a reviewable internal clip-art asset.

items.name: Generate College Application Essay
items.description: Draft a personal college application essay: find a distinctive angle from the applicant's background, structure a focused story, then draft a voice-driven essay that answers the prompt within the word limit.
items.shortDescription: Draft a distinctive personal college application essay.

items.name: Generate Expository Essay
items.description: Explain a topic clearly and objectively: organize the key facts and concepts into a logical structure, then draft a balanced expository essay that informs without arguing a side.
items.shortDescription: Explain a topic clearly in a balanced expository essay.

items.name: Generate Narrative Essay
items.description: Tell a true, reflective story: shape a premise and narrative arc, structure the scenes, then draft a narrative essay with vivid detail and a clear reflective takeaway.
items.shortDescription: Shape a reflective story into a narrative essay.

items.name: Generate Research Infographic
items.description: Produce a vertical infographic that visualizes a research report. Invokes the Generate Research Report workflow as a sub-workflow, then renders its findings as an image with gpt-image-2.
items.shortDescription: Turn a research report into a vertical infographic.

items.name: Generate Research Paper
items.description: Produce a multi-section academic research paper: synthesize the evidence around a research question, plan the standard sections, then draft a cited paper with an abstract, body sections, and references.
items.shortDescription: Draft a cited, multi-section academic research paper.

items.name: Generate Research Report
items.description: Produce a structured, cited research report on a topic using LLM synthesis. Reusable on its own or as a sub-workflow feeding other artifacts.
items.shortDescription: Synthesize a structured, cited research report.
